goals.title: Relevant code paths: `app/shared/contracts/models/tooling.py`, `app/s...
goals.objective: Relevant code paths: `app/shared/contracts/models/tooling.py`, `app/services/tooling/service.py`, `app/services/orchestrator/agents/chatbot.py`, `app/messaging/mesh_bus.py`, `app/services/gateway/mesh/peer_registry.py`, `tests/unit/tooling/test_service.py`, `tests/unit/orchestrator/test_chatbot.py`, `tests/integration/test_mesh_routing.py`.

goals.title: Invariants: bus-only communication, typed Tooling contract constants/...
goals.objective: Invariants: bus-only communication, typed Tooling contract constants/models, privacy-first discovery with no raw secrets, backward-compatible `Tooling.GetTools`.
goals.evidence: Implementation uses typed ToolingMethods constants, Pydantic IO models, MeshAddressSelector, and bus.request fanout; no direct service implementation calls added.

goals.title: `Tooling.GetToolCatalog` returns local tools plus all eligible remote...
goals.objective: `Tooling.GetToolCatalog` returns local tools plus all eligible remote Tooling provider tools in one response.
goals.evidence: Tooling.GetToolCatalog aggregates local Tooling.GetTools results plus eligible remote Tooling providers; unit coverage includes local and remote safe tools together.

goals.title: Remote fanout uses explicit `MeshAddressSelector` requests to `Toolin...
goals.objective: Remote fanout uses explicit `MeshAddressSelector` requests to `Tooling.GetTools`, so existing MeshBus/PeerBridge policy and provider eligibility gates remain authoritative.
goals.evidence: Remote discovery builds explicit MeshAddressSelector peer/provider/service selectors and integration coverage asserts PeerBridge fanout payloads use Tooling.GetTools with correlation id.

goals.title: Ineligible or failed providers are represented with machine-readable...
goals.objective: Ineligible or failed providers are represented with machine-readable reason codes.
goals.evidence: Catalog provider entries include eligible flag, reason_code, reason, cache_status; tests cover blocked provider and provider timeout degradation.

goals.title: Bindable tool names remain collision-safe and stable across local and...
goals.objective: Bindable tool names remain collision-safe and stable across local and remote providers.
goals.evidence: Catalog preserves ToolingToolInfo stable name/local_name/global_tool_id/provider fields from GetTools serialization; existing collision coverage for remote provider names remains in tests.

goals.title: Dangerous, sensitive, or confirmation-required tools are present as b...
goals.objective: Dangerous, sensitive, or confirmation-required tools are present as blocked/non-bindable catalog entries and are not bound directly to the LLM by the orchestrator.
goals.evidence: Catalog separates unsafe, dangerous, confirmation-required, and permission-denied tools into blocked_tools instead of bindable tools; regression tests cover unsafe and permission-scoped tools.

goals.title: Existing `Tooling.GetTools` behavior stays unchanged for per-provider...
goals.objective: Existing `Tooling.GetTools` behavior stays unchanged for per-provider callers.
goals.evidence: Existing Tooling.GetTools path remains unchanged for per-provider/local discovery; chatbot falls back to legacy GetTools when catalog fails.

goals.title: Add Tooling catalog IO models and `ToolingMethods.GET_TOOL_CATALOG`.
goals.objective: Add Tooling catalog IO models and `ToolingMethods.GET_TOOL_CATALOG`.
goals.evidence: Added ToolingMethods.GET_TOOL_CATALOG plus ToolingGetToolCatalogRequest/Response, provider info, and blocked tool models.

goals.title: Implement `ToolingService._on_get_tool_catalog` with local discovery,...
goals.objective: Implement `ToolingService._on_get_tool_catalog` with local discovery, remote provider candidate fanout, short TTL cache, and cache invalidation on reload/local tool changes.
goals.evidence: Implemented ToolingService._on_get_tool_catalog with local discovery, provider enumeration, concurrent remote fanout, per-peer TTL cache, and manifest-keyed invalidation.

goals.title: Add blocked provider/tool reason projection and safe bindable filtering.
goals.objective: Add blocked provider/tool reason projection and safe bindable filtering.
goals.evidence: Added blocked provider/tool reason projection with reason codes for capacity/policy failures, provider timeout/request/response failures, permission denial, unsafe class, and confirmation required.

goals.title: Update chatbot tool retrieval to prefer `Tooling.GetToolCatalog`, wit...
goals.objective: Update chatbot tool retrieval to prefer `Tooling.GetToolCatalog`, with graceful fallback to legacy `GetTools`.
goals.evidence: Chatbot now requests Tooling.GetToolCatalog and binds only the safe tools subset, with tested fallback to legacy Tooling.GetTools.

goals.title: Add unit tests for local+remote aggregation, collisions, blocked prov...
goals.objective: Add unit tests for local+remote aggregation, collisions, blocked providers, cache invalidation, and unsafe filtering.
goals.evidence: Added unit tests for local+remote aggregation, blocked providers, unsafe tools, permission filtering, remote timeout degradation, and cache invalidation.

goals.title: Add a mocked MeshBus/PeerBridge integration test for explicit remote...
goals.objective: Add a mocked MeshBus/PeerBridge integration test for explicit remote Tooling provider fanout.
goals.evidence: Added integration coverage in tests/integration/test_mesh_routing.py for explicit Tooling provider fanout through MeshBus/PeerBridge.

goals.title: Risk: ToolingService may not always run behind MeshBus in unit tests....
goals.objective: Risk: ToolingService may not always run behind MeshBus in unit tests. Mitigation: detect optional registry/mesh internals conservatively and still return local catalog.
goals.evidence: Risk mitigated by returning local-only catalog when no MeshBus routing registry is present; unit tests use patched provider candidates and local fallback behavior.

goals.title: Risk: remote calls may fail or time out. Mitigation: record a blocked...
goals.objective: Risk: remote calls may fail or time out. Mitigation: record a blocked provider entry and keep local tools available.
goals.evidence: Risk mitigated by concurrent fanout, short per-provider timeout, and failed provider entries; tests cover timeout preserving local tools.

goals.title: Risk: unsafe tools could leak into LLM binding. Mitigation: catalog m...
goals.objective: Risk: unsafe tools could leak into LLM binding. Mitigation: catalog marks bindability and chatbot consumes only bindable tools.
goals.evidence: Risk mitigated by safe bindable subset and blocked_tools list; chatbot binds only catalog tools, not blocked_tools; tests cover dangerous/confirmation-required filtering.

goals.title: `uv run pytest tests/unit/tooling/test_service.py tests/unit/orchestr...
goals.objective: `uv run pytest tests/unit/tooling/test_service.py tests/unit/orchestrator/test_chatbot.py tests/integration/test_mesh_routing.py -q`
